calendar.matters:
AMEND PETITION AS TO MINOR'S MIDDLE NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Petitioner's request to amend Name Change Decree.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:26:40 a.m. and concluding at 9:35:03 a.m.

Christopher Hall appearing for and with Petitioner Alfred Shaw, who is placed under oath and testifies.

Court signs Amended Order to Show Cause and orders publication of the Amended Order to Show Cause for three weeks.

The court will sign the amended decree changing Petitioner's name upon completion of the publication.

Amended Order to Show Cause signed and filed this date. (D505)
